name: Cascaded Reverb
description: A reverb built from three cascaded delay lines with adjustable damping, producing a dense and diffuse sound field.
author: Audiofab

controls.name: Delay
controls.description: Base delay time for the cascaded lines.

controls.name: Repeats
controls.description: Feedback amount — density of the reverb.

controls.name: Damping
controls.description: High-frequency loss in the feedback path.
